data.title: Aethon Energy and Mitsubishi Corporation form global alliance for energy projects, focusing on LNG. #collaboration #Aethon #Mitsubishi
data.description: A Global Strategic Alliance has been formed between Aethon Energy Management LLC and Mitsubishi Corporation. This collaboration aims to explore future commercial opportunities across energy transition and next-generation infrastructure projects globally. The alliance will focus on areas such as liquefied natural gas.

data.title: Capstone Copper reports record 2025 production of 224,764 tonnes, up 22% from 2024. Updates on Mantoverde labour negotiations.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Capstone Copper Corp. (TSX:CS) (ASX:CSC) has reported their consolidated copper production numbers for 2025. The company achieved a record annual copper production of 224,764 tonnes, surpassing their previous year's production by 22%. The figures are all in US dollars unless stated otherwise. Additionally, Capstone provided an update on Mantoverde labor negotiations.

data.title: Sylvamo CEO John Sims releases letter to shareowners; company vision to be top paper employer, supplier, and investment. $SLVM.
data.description: A letter from John Sims, the CEO of Sylvamo (NYSE: SLVM), the world's paper company, is now available for shareowners on the company's website. Sylvamo operates mills in Europe, Latin America, and North America, and aims to be the top choice for employees, suppliers, and investors. The letter can be accessed at investors.sylvamo.com/financials/shareowner-letter. Sylvamo (NYSE: SLVM) is known for transforming renewable resources into essential papers, with a global presence and a commitment to sustainability.

data.title: Global Oil Immersed Current Transformer market valued at USD 1,893M in 2024, projected to reach USD 3,044.3M by 2032 with a CAGR of 6.12%.
data.description: A recent market report indicates that the global Oil Immersed Current Transformer market was valued at USD 1,893 million in 2024. Projections suggest a steady growth at a CAGR of 6.12% from 2024 to 2032, with an expected market value of USD 3,044.3 million.

data.title: MahaloHub introduces Predictive Resonance Score™ to predict creative performance before launch, addressing CMOs' lack of confidence.
data.description: Today, MahaloHub unveiled the Predictive Resonance Score™ (PRS), a groundbreaking AI metric aimed at assisting marketing teams. Within an industry where 70% of CMOs express uncertainty about creative performance pre-launch, this tool aids in gauging message or concept effectiveness.

data.title: Utah man receives 3-year prison term for $2.9M fraud involving crypto cash scheme & investor fraud.
data.description: A man from Utah has been sentenced for his involvement in investor fraud and conducting unlicensed cash-to-crypto operations. The prosecution linked these two illegal activities together. The severity of the sentence serves as a warning to others engaging in similar illicit activities.
